title: AI & Automation Engineer
company_focus:
Human-centric cybersecurity protecting email, cloud, and
collaboration tools
description:
About Us:



Proofpoint is a global leader in human- and agent-centric
cybersecurity. We protect how people, data, and AI agents
connect across email, cloud, and collaboration tools. Over
80 of the Fortune 100, 10,000 large enterprises, and
millions of smaller organizations trust Proofpoint to stop
threats, prevent data loss, and build resilience across
their people and AI workflows. Our mission is simple:
safeguard the digital world and empower people to work
securely and confidently. Join us in our pursuit to defend
data and protect people.

How We Work:

At Proofpoint you’ll be part of a global team that breaks
barriers to redefine cybersecurity guided by our BRAVE core
values:

Bold in how we dream and innovate

Responsive to feedback, challenges and opportunities

Accountable for results and best in class outcomes

Visionary in future focused problem-solving

Exceptional in execution and impact

Corporate Overview Proofpoint is a leading cybersecurity
company protecting organizations’ greatest assets and
biggest risks: vulnerabilities in people. With an integrated
suite of cloud-based solutions, Proofpoint helps companies
around the world stop targeted threats, safeguard their
data, and make their users more resilient against cyber-
attacks. Leading organizations of all sizes, including more
than half of the Fortune 1000, rely on Proofpoint for
people-centric security and compliance solutions mitigating
their most critical risks across email, the cloud, social
media, and the web. We are singularly devoted to helping our
customers protect their greatest assets and biggest security
risk: their people. That’s why we’re a leader in next-
generation cybersecurity. Protection Starts with People.
Proofpoint. Job Overview

We are seeking an innovative and highly skilled AI Engineer
to join our HR Technology team. This role will design,
build, and maintain AI-driven solutions that enhance
employee experience, streamline HR processes, and expand our
HR Technology roadmap using Microsoft Copilot, Workday data,
and other enterprise AI platforms. The ideal candidate has a
strong technical background in AI/ML, natural language
processing, and automation, with a passion for applying
emerging technologies within HR. You will collaborate with
HR, Workday Functional Leads, HR Shared Services, Security,
and cross-functional business teams to design secure,
scalable, compliant, and high-impact AI solutions.

Key Responsibilities

AI & Copilot Development

• Develop and deploy Copilot Extensions, Plugins, AI Agents,
and workflows that leverage HR and Workday data.

• Build secure, governed prompts and knowledge bases for HR
use cases (policies, processes, onboarding, talent
management, knowledge articles).

• Create AI-enabled automation to support Employee
Relations, Talent Acquisition, Talent Management,
Compensation, and HR Operations. HR Analytics & Natural
Language Processing

• Implement HR focused NLP models for tasks such as
summarization, classification, data extraction, Q&A, and
document generation.

• Develop chatbots and conversational interfaces integrated
with HR data sources. • Apply machine learning techniques to
enhance predictions and insights in areas like attrition
risk, workforce planning, and employee sentiment. Systems
Integration & Data Engineering

• Integrate AI tools with Workday, document repositories, HR
knowledge content, and enterprise data systems.

• Collaborate with Workday Integrations team on creating
secure APIs, custom reports, and data pipelines required for
AI workloads.

• Ensure all AI solutions follow SOX, ITGC, GDPR, and
internal governance standards. Solution Architecture &
Governance

• Partner with HR leaders to identify opportunities for AI
innovation and automate manual processes.

• Participate in AI governance committees and support the
development of ethical AI frameworks for HR.

• Document technical designs, workflows, and solution
architectures following HR Technology standards. Support &
Continuous Improvement

• Troubleshoot production issues with AI workflows, plugins,
and Copilot integrations.

• Monitor model performance and user adoption; implement
improvements and training as needed.

• Stay current with emerging AI technologies, Microsoft
Copilot updates, and Workday AI capabilities.

Required Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, Data
Science, or related technical field.

• 2+ years of experience in AI/ML, NLP, data engineering, or
software engineering.

• Proficiency with Python, Azure AI Services,
OpenAI/Microsoft models, or similar frameworks.

• Experience building AI agents, chatbots, or generative AI
features.

• Strong understanding of REST APIs, JSON, and Workday
integration patterns.

• Ability to translate HR business needs into scalable
technical solutions.

Preferred Qualifications

• Experience working with Workday (HCM, Reporting,
Integrations, Extend, or Prism Analytics).

• Knowledge of Microsoft 365 ecosystem: Copilot Studio,
Power Platform, Azure OpenAI, Graph connectors.

• Hands-on experience with machine learning models for
summarization, classification, and semantic search.

• Experience working in regulated environments with
sensitive HR data.

• Strong communication skills with the ability to work
effectively across HR, IT, Security, and business teams.

Key Competencies

• Innovation & Problem Solving

• Technical Leadership

• HR Process Understanding

• Data Privacy & Governance Mindset

• Collaboration & Stakeholder Management

• Continuous Learning & Adaptability

Why Proofpoint Protecting people is at the heart of our
award-winning lineup of cybersecurity solutions, and the
people who work here are the key to our success.  We’re a
customer-focused and a driven-to-win organization with
leading-edge products. We are an inclusive, diverse,
multinational company that believes in culture fit, but more
importantly ‘culture-add’, and we strongly encourage people
from all walks of life to apply. We believe in hiring the
best and the brightest to help cultivate our culture of
collaboration and appreciation. Apply today and explore your
future at Proofpoint! #LifeAtProofpoint

Why Proofpoint?

At Proofpoint, we believe that an exceptional career
experience includes a comprehensive compensation and
benefits package. Here are just a few reasons you’ll love
working with us:

- Competitive compensation
- Comprehensive benefits
- Career success on your terms
- Flexible work environment
- Annual wellness and community outreach days
- Always on recognition for your contributions
- Global collaboration and networking opportunities



Our Culture:

Our culture is rooted in values that inspire belonging,
empower purpose and drive success-every day, for everyone.

We encourage applications from individuals of all
backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. If you need
accommodation during the application or interview process,
please reach out to accessibility@proofpoint.com.

How to Apply

Interested? Submit your application along with any
supporting information- we can’t wait to hear from you!
responsibilities: Develop and deploy Copilot Extensions, Plugins, AI Agents, and workflows leveraging HR and Workday data
Build secure, governed prompts and knowledge bases for HR use cases including policies, processes, and onboarding
Implement HR-focused NLP models for summarization, classification, data extraction, Q&A, and document generation
Develop chatbots and conversational interfaces integrated with HR data sources
Apply machine learning techniques to enhance predictions for attrition risk, workforce planning, and employee sentiment
Integrate AI tools with Workday, document repositories, and enterprise data systems
Partner with HR leaders to identify AI innovation opportunities and automate manual processes

Employee onboarding and knowledge management assistance
Workforce planning and attrition risk prediction
HR document generation and Q&A systems
Conversational HR support and chatbot interfaces
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves building and deploying AI agents, Copilot
extensions, plugins, and workflows, implementing NLP models,
and creating chatbots and conversational interfaces. The
engineer will directly work with generative AI features and
machine learning models, making this a hands-on AI
development role.
